title: Non-record: TernaryRecurrentGPT - ternary 1.58-bit MLP + depth recurrence (1xL4 val_bpb=1.5348)
body:
## Architecture
- 7 unique layers × 2 loops = 14 effective depth
- Ternary MLP weights (1.58-bit STE QAT, enabled at 85% of training)
- Loop gates initialized at 1.0 (fixes failure mode in PR #319)
- BigramHash 2048, SmearGate, FP16 tied embeddings
- Muon (matrix) + AdamW (scalars), WD=0.04, SWA from 40%

## Results (1×L4, reduced batch validation)
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| val_bpb pre-quant | 2.5044 |
| val_bpb post-quant | 1.5348 |
| Artifact size | 12,372,468 bytes |
| Quant gap | 0.002 bpb |

## Notes
- Local validation at reduced batch (32k tokens, seq=512)
- Full 8×H100 competition-scale run pending compute grant
- Neural Cache disabled — adds +0.028 bpb at this scale
